goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 10:15' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of swimmingpool
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 10:15 and should go to norwich
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
